prompt: A highly detailed anime fantasy portrait of a serene fox-eared young woman in left-facing side profile, shown from about thigh-up, centered slightly right of frame. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white with a soft pink tint at the ends"} hair, large white fox ears, pale skin, and one visible vivid {argument name="eye color" default="blue"} eye. Her expression is calm, introspective, and luminous. She wears an elegant {argument name="kimono color" default="black"} kimono richly decorated with intricate gold and red floral patterns, with a traditional obi visible at the back. In her hair is an ornate kanzashi-style floral ornament made of red, gold, and black flowers with dangling gold chains and tassels. Behind her head is a large glowing circular celestial magic halo, formed by 3 concentric rings with fine arcane symbols, star-like points, and radiant golden lines, creating a sacred, mystical backlight. The background is a dark textured painterly space with dramatic black, bronze, and crimson brush textures, glowing embers, gold splashes, and scattered flowers near the lower left. Add 1 vertical line of Japanese calligraphy along the left side reading {argument name="vertical text" default="夢は光のように、静かに心を照らす。"}, plus 1 small red seal stamp beneath it. Use cinematic rim lighting, intense golden glow, ultra-detailed fabric, delicate hair strands, sparkling particles, elegant Japanese fantasy atmosphere, premium illustration quality, masterpiece anime key visual, refined composition, dramatic contrast, and a polished painterly finish.
translatedPrompt: 一幅细节极其丰富的动漫奇幻肖像，描绘了一位神情宁静、长着狐耳的年轻女性，侧脸朝左，构图约为大腿以上，略微偏向画面右侧。她拥有一头飘逸的长发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色，发梢带有柔和的粉色调"}，长着一对白色大狐耳，皮肤白皙，露出一只明亮的 {argument name="eye color" default="蓝色"} 眼眸。她的表情平静、内敛且充满灵气。她身着一件优雅的 {argument name="kimono color" default="黑色"} 和服，上面装饰着精致的红金花卉图案，背部可见传统的腰带。她的发间佩戴着华丽的簪花式发饰，由红、金、黑三色花朵组成，垂坠着金链和流苏。她脑后悬浮着一个巨大的发光圆形天体魔法光环，由 3 个同心圆组成，上面刻有精细的奥术符号、星芒点和放射状的金线，营造出神圣而神秘的背光效果。背景为深色调的油画质感空间，带有戏剧性的黑、青铜和深红笔触，点缀着发光的余烬、金色溅射效果以及左下角散落的花瓣。在左侧添加 1 行竖排日文书法，内容为 {argument name="vertical text" default="夢は光のように、静かに心を照らす。"}，下方盖有一枚红色印章。采用电影级轮廓光、强烈的金色光晕、超精细的织物纹理、细腻的发丝、闪烁的粒子效果，营造出优雅的日式奇幻氛围，具备顶级插画品质、大师级动漫视觉图、精致的构图、强烈的对比度以及细腻的油画质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 狐妖和服肖像：此提示词可生成一位身着华丽和服、头顶狐耳、自带神圣金色光环的动漫风格女性，非常适合用于奇幻角色艺术、海报或极具张力的个人资料插画。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, backlight]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
